title.en: China-to-Samoa Solar PV Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器进入萨摩亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器進入薩摩亞：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China solar PV inverter documentation against Samoa MCIL market-access context, Office of the Regulator electricity oversight, Electric Power Corporation grid-connection expectations, IEC 62109 safety evidence, IEC 62116 anti-islanding, IEC 61727 grid interface, IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 EMC evidence, 50 Hz 230/400 V grid settings, Australia-New Zealand legacy references, and cyclone / salt-mist coastal derating — versus China GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 19964 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国太阳能光伏逆变器文件与萨摩亚MCIL市场准入背景、监管办公室电力监管、Electric Power Corporation并网预期、IEC 62109安全证据、IEC 62116防孤岛、IEC 61727电网接口、IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 EMC证据、50 Hz 230/400 V电网参数、澳新标准历史引用及气旋/沿海盐雾降额要求——对比中国GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964基准的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國太陽能光伏逆變器文件與薩摩亞MCIL市場准入背景、監管辦公室電力監管、Electric Power Corporation併網預期、IEC 62109安全證據、IEC 62116防孤島、IEC 61727電網介面、IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 EMC證據、50 Hz 230/400 V電網參數、澳新標準歷史引用及氣旋/沿海鹽霧降額要求——對比中國GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964基準的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, Samoa MCIL import approval, Office of the Regulator electricity licence or code interpretation, Electric Power Corporation grid-connection approval, customs determination, or market-access approval. Samoa does not appear to operate a strong dedicated national standards body for PV inverter product certification; exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current MCIL, OOTR, EPC, customs, project-owner, IEC, and Australia-New Zealand legacy requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、萨摩亚MCIL进口批准、监管办公室电力许可或规范解释、Electric Power Corporation并网批准、海关裁定或市场准入批准。萨摩亚似乎没有针对光伏逆变器产品认证的强专门国家标准机构；出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核实现行MCIL、OOTR、EPC、海关、项目业主、IEC及澳新历史引用要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、薩摩亞MCIL進口批准、監管辦公室電力許可或規範解釋、Electric Power Corporation併網批准、海關裁定或市場准入批准。薩摩亞似乎沒有針對光伏逆變器產品認證的強專門國家標準機構；出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核實現行MCIL、OOTR、EPC、海關、項目業主、IEC及澳新歷史引用要求。

answer_first.en: For solar PV inverters exported from China to Samoa, the practical gaps are: (1) confirming MCIL import and product documentation expectations because Samoa does not appear to have a strong dedicated standards body for PV inverter certification; (2) obtaining IEC 62109-1/-2 safety evidence expected by EPC projects and financiers; (3) providing IEC 62116 and IEC 61727 grid-interface evidence for OOTR / EPC review; (4) providing IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 EMC evidence; (5) validating firmware for Samoa's 50 Hz / 230 V / 400 V grid, which differs from China's 50 Hz / 220 V / 380 V nominal voltage; and (6) documenting cyclone, humidity, and salt-mist coastal derating plus sea-freight spares planning through Apia. China GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 19964 evidence is useful background but is not automatically accepted as Samoa IEC or EPC project evidence.
answer_first.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器出口萨摩亚时，主要实际差距包括：（1）确认MCIL进口及产品文件预期，因为萨摩亚似乎没有针对光伏逆变器认证的强专门标准机构；（2）取得EPC项目和融资方通常预期的IEC 62109-1/-2安全证据；（3）提供IEC 62116和IEC 61727并网接口证据供OOTR / EPC审查；（4）提供IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 EMC证据；（5）针对萨摩亚50 Hz / 230 V / 400 V电网验证固件，该电压不同于中国50 Hz / 220 V / 380 V标称电压；（6）记录气旋、湿热和沿海盐雾降额，以及经阿皮亚海运的备件计划。中国GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964证据可作为背景资料，但不会自动被接受为萨摩亚IEC或EPC项目证据。
answer_first.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器出口薩摩亞時，主要實際差距包括：（1）確認MCIL進口及產品文件預期，因為薩摩亞似乎沒有針對光伏逆變器認證的強專門標準機構；（2）取得EPC項目和融資方通常預期的IEC 62109-1/-2安全證據；（3）提供IEC 62116和IEC 61727併網介面證據供OOTR / EPC審查；（4）提供IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 EMC證據；（5）針對薩摩亞50 Hz / 230 V / 400 V電網驗證韌體，該電壓不同於中國50 Hz / 220 V / 380 V標稱電壓；（6）記錄氣旋、濕熱和沿海鹽霧降額，以及經阿皮亞海運的備件計畫。中國GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964證據可作為背景資料，但不會自動被接受為薩摩亞IEC或EPC項目證據。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
